hooks.command: D="c:/Users/Admin/Documents/LLM Wiki/ACT笔记-深度思考"; FOCUS="$D/3-Action/3-1-Focus-聚焦承诺"; ARCH="$D/6-storage/6-1-archive-归档"; SENTINEL="/tmp/focus-archive-$(date +%Y%m%d)"; [ -f "$SENTINEL" ] && exit 0; touch "$SENTINEL"; c=0; for f in "$FOCUS"/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if head -50 "$f" | grep -qE 'status:[[:space:]]*completed|已经完成|已完成|最终完成' 2>/dev/null; then target="$ARCH/raw"; if head -50 "$f" | grep -qE '当升科技|广东申菱|中信建设|中交|中原|中海油|杰瑞|物探' 2>/dev/null; then for d in "$ARCH/项目归档"/*/; do n=$(basename "$d"); if head -50 "$f" | grep -qi "$n" 2>/dev/null; then target="$d"; break; fi; done; fi; mkdir -p "$target"; mv "$f" "$target/" 2>/dev/null && c=$((c+1)); fi; done; [ $c -gt 0 ] && echo "📦 Focus归档: $c 个文件已移动" || true

cd "c:/Users/Admin/Documents/LLM Wiki" && git add .claude/ .obsidian/ .agents/skills/ _临时文件/ skills-lock.json CLAUDE.md .gitignore && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "$(date '+auto backup %Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin main)
